infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FatafatDecor Partner uses your camera to take a selfie check-in proof at the customer's location and to photograph the finished decoration.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FatafatDecor Partner accesses your photo library so you can upload photos of the completed decoration for the customer and office records.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FatafatDecor Partner uses your location to share live tracking with the customer while you are on the way to and at the job.

plugins.photosPermission: FatafatDecor Partner accesses your photo library so you can upload photos of the completed decoration.
plugins.cameraPermission: FatafatDecor Partner uses your camera for selfie check-in proof and photos of the finished decoration.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FatafatDecor Partner needs your location to share live tracking with the customer during a job.
